💌 For Hiba

— a message from Ameen —

Creating
Unforgettable Memories

I saw beauty in your face,
A beauty I'll never forget.

Nothing in this world describes
how stunning you are.

Your beauty is proof that
Allah exists.

Only Allah could create
a face like yours. 🌹

Moments Over

❤️

Forever
Yours, Hiba.

Every moment with you feels like a gift from above.
You are my peace, my smile, my everything.
I am so grateful Allah brought you into my world. 🤲

— Your Ameen 💍

with all my love · always
